channel.title: YouTube Intelligence Brief
channel.description: Daily intelligence brief synthesizing trends, hot topics, and cross-channel convergence from a 53-channel YouTube monitoring network.
channel.itunes:author: Knowledge Studio
channel.itunes:summary: Daily intelligence brief synthesizing trends, hot topics, and cross-channel convergence from a 53-channel YouTube monitoring network.

item.title: YouTube Intelligence Daily Brief — March 22, 2026
item.description: Welcome back. We're tracking some really interesting shifts in the AI infrastructure world right now, and I want to walk you through what's actually happening beneath the headlines. Because there's a story here about markets bifurcating, data becoming the real bottleneck, and the economics of automa...

item.title: YouTube Intelligence Daily Brief — March 21, 2026
item.description:
Hey, welcome back. We've got a lot to dig into today, and honestly, this is one of those days where the signal density is really high—there are some genuine inflection points happening in how people are actually building things right now.
Let's start with what's probably the most important thing I'...

item.title: YouTube Intelligence Brief — March 19, 2026
item.description:
Welcome to the show. We're covering a lot of ground today, and honestly, it feels like we're watching a major inflection point happen in real time—the moment when AI agents stop being experimental tools and become actual infrastructure that people are building real businesses on.
Let's start with w...
